text: @KenyanSays Chinese are the real untouchable cartel in Nairobi right now
label: hate
rationale: 'Chinese are the real untouchable cartel' - collective attribution of criminal/cartel activity to a national-origin group as a group, NCIC contempt standard.

text: @geraged Go tell your nyanye I don't care what entitled kikuyus think
label: hate
rationale: 'entitled kikuyus' - collective negative character attribution (entitlement) to the Kikuyu community as a group, not to a named individual.

text: Fuck tutam Fuck that filthy dog Fuxk all the tutam cows
label: hate
rationale: 'filthy dog', 'cows' applied collectively to 'all the tutam' - dehumanising animal epithets directed at an ethnic sub-community as a whole.

text: @nuur970 We ukienda kwa mkutano u asalimianga watu kama umekaa chini,mara linda mwannchi aina gender equality mara waluyha wanaskiza wanawake aje??wtf do you mf want
label: neither
rationale: Frustration directed at an individual's inconsistent political positions; the Luhya reference is about listening behaviour in a specific meeting context, not a collective negative attribution.

text: @Benowitiyada @HEBabuOwino I've been asking the same question. Why'd Luos continue to die even when they purport to be in the government? Dying for other community's presidential candidates!
label: neither
rationale: Questioning why Luo lives are lost in political violence - a critical political observation about sacrifice and representation, not contempt toward any community.

text: @Kiserianm @wilber1990f Hamjachoka kutaja WaKikuyu? Keep your teeth fixated on Kikuyus while the rest of Kenya is fleeting on And Kikuyus are enough to remove him. They have no candidate in 2027 and their 5-6 million votes will go to another. GEMA, Kambas, Kisii and Luhyia are already 55%+ of voters
label: neither
rationale: Electoral bloc arithmetic and voting-power analysis; no contempt or collective negative attribution is directed at any community.

text: @PeterSweden7 Women are retarded. This is why they didn't have voting rights. Giving women political power was suicidal. We need to strip it from them.
label: hate
rationale: 'Women are retarded' plus 'strip' voting rights - collective derogation and call for exclusion of women from political life on the basis of gender, a protected characteristic.

text: @Kibet_bull Next year wakikuyu watapelekewa mpaka mobile massage parlours 😂 Hate them or love them, they're the undisputed first loves of mobali nangai. He's simping for them unashamedly. ALLEGEDLY ofcourse.
label: neither
rationale: Sardonic commentary on perceived presidential favouritism toward Kikuyu voters; mocking Ruto's perceived pandering rather than attributing a negative collective characteristic to Kikuyu people.

text: @Hitormisssince @ntvkenya @MichelleNgele_ Eeeh...nawaona kama matako kubwa tena ile inanuka, mtu akisema ukweli mnasema ni mkabila na nyinyi ndio wakabila wakubwa sana.
label: offensive
rationale: 'matako kubwa inanuka' - vulgar personal insult directed at the addressees; 'mkabila' accusation is a counter-charge in an argument, not collective ethnic contempt.

text: RT @Kimuzi_: Haha nlichoka Na Sisi Kenyans. Sielewi mbona useme Tutam Na unaishi a dilapidated lifestyle. Alafu Kuna wajinga wengine Wa Gachagua. Timid and very stupid in the head.
label: hate
rationale: 'useme Tutam na unaishi dilapidated lifestyle' + 'timid and very stupid' - mocking those who identify as Tutam as hypocritically poor and stupid, a collective contempt attribution.

text: SIFUNA wako wengi
label: neither
rationale: Brief political statement that Sifuna has many supporters; no attack, contempt, or protected-characteristic targeting.

text: @tonnie_moremi Nachukia watu wawili hii Dunia.... Kasongo na Maghalaes🖕🏾
label: offensive
text_note: Kasongo and Magalhães are individual figures, not ethnic groups
rationale: 'Nachukia' (I hate) directed at two named individuals with a middle-finger emoji - personal hostility, no group-based protected characteristic.

text: @Belive_Kinuthia Luos dont vote and having no presidential candidate on ballot will be lots of voters apathy , luhya nation is gone by sifuna and kisii are safe behind matiangi kambas and mt kenya are all behind kalonzo and Riggy G and somalis move with wind
label: neither
rationale: Multi-community electoral bloc analysis predicting voting behaviour; no contempt or negative attribution to any group.

text: @KenyanSays Kenyans are ungovernable, once they're provoked to send 'goons' to that place, it will be very messy
label: neither
rationale: Prediction of political disorder if tensions escalate; 'Kenyans' is not a protected ethnic sub-group and no ethnic community is targeted; 'goons' used in generic political-thuggery sense.

text: Niondoleeni upuzi wana kasongo. Shenzi
label: offensive
rationale: 'Shenzi' and 'upuzi' are crude insults aimed at Kasongo supporters as individuals/political group, not at an ethnic community as such.

text: RT @joeselasini: Hata Polisi ni Watanganyika. Nani anasema hakukuwa na maandamano 7/7? Mtaandamana hadi wauwaji na waporaji wa uchaguzi watakaposalimu amri. Wanaharakati wako mbele zaidi yenu.
label: hate
rationale: 'Hata Polisi ni Watanganyika' - labels the police force collectively by a foreign national-origin epithet to delegitimise them, attributing alien identity to a state institution as a group slur.

text: @CSakwah Hakuna undecided voters.Watu wanasema ni Sifuna.Kisii pia wako kwa matiangi,Kambas kwa Kalonzo.Without Sifuna as the presidential candidate Linda mwananchi yote itarudi kwa Ruto.They are just known turncoats.
label: neither
rationale: Electoral coalition analysis with 'turncoats' as a political (not ethnic) characterisation of a party's shifting allegiance.

text: @NPSOfficial_KE You're a bunch of tribal murderers and goons period #RutoMustGo kiambaa church massacre
label: offensive
rationale: 'tribal murderers and goons' directed at the police institution (@NPSOfficial_KE) in the context of the Kiambaa massacre - abusive attack on an institution, not collective contempt toward an ethnic community.

text: @Kvaati @mwabilimwagodi2 Bana. These Kasongo dimwits are lunatics.
label: offensive
rationale: 'Dimwits', 'lunatics' aimed at Kasongo's political supporters as a group - abusive but based on political affiliation, not a protected characteristic.

text: @pksalasya @rigathi Yaaani mwanaume kamili muwanga Kutokeko mumias can stoop this low.? Terrible.
label: neither
rationale: Expression of disappointment at one named individual (muwanga from Mumias) for their behaviour; no collective contempt attributed to the Luhya/Muwanga community.

text: @Baradhuli2 Hakuna maandamano ndani ya @ChademaTZ2 chama cha wananchi. Labda muwakodi wale wakatorikifeki wa buza🤣🤣🤣
label: neither
rationale: Political mockery of a Tanzanian opposition party's paid agitators ('wakatorikifeki wa buza') - partisan political banter, no ethnic group targeted.

text: @Rutojames7113 Na sijui mbona kalenjins na luhya na Luo huona kuoa kikuyu NI achievements Yet Sisi boys a WA mlimA tunawaanza wakiwa vajo na kuwazalisha first born
label: hate
rationale: Framing inter-ethnic marriage as a hierarchy of conquest ('tunawaanza wakiwa vajo, kuwazalisha first born') - collective sexual-dominance contempt directed across ethnic communities, degrading the Kikuyu community specifically through sexualised othering.

text: @RodgersKipembe meru will have no power without kikuyu
label: neither
rationale: Political-power analysis about coalition dependency between two ethnic communities; no contempt or negative attribute assigned to either group.

text: RT @gwamaee: Operation Fagilia Udaku party from Mlima & we bring In President SIFUNA , anyone wa UDA kwa mlima we treat them as collaborators with an enemy of our people, one who has kiled our people, our businesses na uchumi ya Kenya ! , huyu mzungu mweusi anaitwa Ruto lazima atoke kwa mlima completely,reke tumanwo! Olkalou haroo #SisiNdioSifuna #BaBuKwaSababu #RutoMustGo #TukoKadi #JusticeForOurMashujaa
label: hate
rationale: 'anyone wa UDA kwa mlima we treat them as collaborators with an enemy' plus 'lazima atoke kwa mlima completely' - calling for expulsion of a political faction defined by ethnic region (mlima/Mt Kenya) and branding co-ethnics as enemy collaborators.

text: The most tragic part of Olkalau is kikuyu nation picking their worst to be their leader. Gachagua mortally wounded sunk. It akin to picking Matiba in 90s when it was obvious he was mentally gone. Luckly Matiba run so mad, burnt his ID n was saved by his family n kibaku took over
label: neither
rationale: Criticism of Kikuyu political leadership choices centred on two named individuals (Gachagua, Matiba); harsh but directed at specific leaders, not a collective negative attribution to the Kikuyu community as such.
